texto: Why has the medical profession not taken advantage of the help available from evolutionary biology, a well-developed branch of science with great potential for providing medical insights? One reason is surely the pervasive neglect of this branch of science at all educational levels. Religious and other sorts of opposition have minimized the impact in general education of Darwin's contributions to our understanding of ourselves and the world we live in.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Randolph M. Nesse que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Why has the medical profession not taken advantage of the help available from evolutionary biolog…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, creationism, education, com foco em education e evolution.

texto: Chlamydia, today´s most common cause of venereal disease, does the equivalent of hiding in the police station.Schistosomes of the mansoni type go a step further and essentially steal police uniforms. These parasites, a serious cause of liver disease in Asia, pick up blood-group antigens so that they may look to the immune system like our own normal blood cells.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Randolph M. Nesse: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Chlamydia, today´s most common cause of venereal disease, does the equivalent of hiding in the po…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, humor, medicine pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de medicine.

texto: Darwinism gives no moral guidelines about how we should live or how doctors should practice medicine. A Darwinian perspective on medicine can, however, help us to understand the evolutionary origins of disease, and this knowledge will prove profoundly useful in achieving the legitimate goals of medicine.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Randolph M. Nesse sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Darwinism gives no moral guidelines about how we should live or how doctors should practice medic…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, darwinism, medicine, útil em momentos de medicine.
